note: Source of truth for labs.bowtiefunnel.com/agent-skills/. Agent skills repurposed from the Growth (Verbiflow) MCP and rebranded for Bowtie Funnel. To add a skill, append one object below: name, lifecycle (array of stages), description. Stages: Awareness, Education, Selection, Mutual commit, Onboarding, Retention, Expansion.

skills.name: Account & Market Research
skills.description: Researches target companies and their investors, surfacing firmographics and recent activity so we prioritize the accounts worth pursuing.

skills.name: Prospect List Builder
skills.description: Builds targeted contact lists from known companies, personas, and LinkedIn — the raw audience behind every play.

skills.name: Hiring & Growth Signals
skills.description: Finds companies actively hiring or scaling, surfacing the timing signals that mean they're ready to buy now.

skills.name: Buying-Intent Miner
skills.description: Mines LinkedIn posts, comments, and reactions to find people already engaging with the topic — warm before we ever reach out.

skills.name: Website Visitor De-anonymizer
skills.description: Turns anonymous website traffic into named contacts and companies we can route straight to sales — or, aimed at current clients, into an account-activity signal.

skills.name: Contact Enrichment
skills.description: Fills in verified emails, phones, and profile attributes so every record is complete and reachable.

skills.name: Lead Qualification & Scoring
skills.description: Scores lists against the ICP with AI so effort only goes to right-fit accounts, not the whole list.

skills.name: Sequence Builder
skills.description: Drafts and publishes multi-step, multichannel outreach sequences ready to run.

skills.name: AI Personalization
skills.description: Writes a per-prospect opener from real research instead of generic mail-merge.

skills.name: Multichannel Sender
skills.description: Sends and tracks email and LinkedIn touches, with deliverability checks before anything goes out.

skills.name: Engagement Tracker
skills.description: Monitors replies, statuses, and conversation history to see who's engaging and when to act.

skills.name: CRM Sync
skills.description: Reads and reconciles CRM objects and associations so every play runs off live account data.

skills.name: Data Ops & Artifacts
skills.description: Manages the lists, joins, and exports that move data between every other skill.
